text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess appears exhausted, so I take
her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I suppose even Princess Fighter does always tell the viewers to "train hard, eat well, and get plenty of rest!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-where am I?!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to make your acquaintance, Kawakami
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What?! P-Princess Fighter?! I-i-i-in the flesh?!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's not just me! Take a look over there.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's the Princess Fighter☆Stars and the
Princess Fighter♪Quartet! The heroines from
across the generations are all gathered here!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right! And we're all about to race
together! As for you, Kawakami Princess...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you inviting me to join your race?!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text: Of course! Hehe, are you prepared?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You... you bet! I'm ready and raring to go
anytime!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If I'm with all of you, I could run to the ends of
the universe!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Huh?! A dream? Awww, and we were just about
to reach Andromeda, too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But still! I got to run a bunch with everyone from
Princess Fighter! It was exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess returns from the infirmary
looking energetic and refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
We've prepared you a very special seat! You can
enjoy watching us run to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um, right! Th-thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa, I'd expect nothing less from the
first-generation Princess Fighter! She really knows
how to close the gap!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I'm actually seeing this! As a fan, I
can barely even put this feeling into... words...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh! But still, I really wanted to be out there
running alongside them all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, what was I dreaming about just now? All I
remember is feeling... disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess returns from the infirmary, but
it doesn't look like she's recovered very much.
